org.docgene.model

Class XMLTextStyle

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLTextStyle
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NonEmptyLineAscendant, ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement

    public class XMLTextStyle
extends java.lang.Object
implements ParagraphElementParent, ParagraphElement, NonEmptyLineAscendant
    Represents the style of a text.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE
